nasb.text: Go therefore and make disciples of all the nations, baptizing them in the name of the Father and the Son and the Holy Spirit,

esv.text: Go therefore and make disciples of all nations, baptizing them inthe name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit,

cnv.text: 所以，你們要去使萬民作我的門徒，奉父子聖靈的名，給他們施洗，

ccb.text: 所以，你们要去使万民做我的门徒，奉父、子、圣灵的名给他们施洗，

csbs.text: 所以你们要去，使万民成为我的门徒；奉父、子、圣灵的名给他们施洗；
